name: web_execute_js
description: Execute JavaScript inside a specific browser tab (session) via the Tampermonkey driver. Use switch_tab_id to target the correct tab; do not try to "click" tabs via page DOM.

script.description: JavaScript code to execute inside the target page. Prefer navigation via location.href/window.open(...,'_self') to keep the same connected tab.

switch_tab_id.description: Optional. Target tab/session id returned by web_scan metadata.tabs[].id. If omitted, uses the current active tab in the driver.
